raw_inputs.deck_text: Flowbench is a real-time collaborative data-pipeline debugger we built this weekend at TreeHacks 2025. We built a working demo end to end during the hackathon: a live web app where you can paste a pipeline config and see step-by-step execution traces with teammates in real time. We submitted our project on Devpost under the team name 'Flowbench' with a full writeup and a link to our live deployed demo. No GitHub org yet — we kept the repo private during the hackathon judging period and haven't gotten around to publishing it.
